BorderWar.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	Members of the radical far right militia operating in the northeast of Drastara, the Rozbójnik Osin, earlier today opened fire on an Ambernesian national guard patrol near the city of Minthol. The city, the former capital of Drastara before the war of Ambernesian Independance, has become a source of renewed tensions in recent months after Ambenesian President Milos Bercha announced the 'liberation' of the city as chief concern in his reelection campaign. This is not the first time shots have been fired over the 450,000 population city. Following the end of the second intercontinental war, Ambernesian forces, who sided with the Concordat to fight against the Southern Alliance which Drastara was a part of, refused to end their occupation of the city. In response, Drastaran terror campaigns for months drained Ambernesia's grip on the region until the state peacefully withdrew. After that, the battle for control over the city had raged in the halls of the ICA. Although the Ambernesian-Drastaran peace treaty drafted now almost a hundred years ago in 1928 did call for 'deoccupation' of the city by the occuping Ambernesian forces, the vaugeness of the exact terms left room for both states ot interpret the issue of ownership at will. Although since then ICA legislation has ruled against past Ambernesian ambition, as Drastara shifts further torwards Xiadia and against the ICA it remains to be seen whether the ICA's priorities will shift on the issue.
BorderWar.NewsTitle: Ambernesia and Drastara clash at Minthol
BorderWar.Title: BorderWar

CelebrityDeathA.NewsFull:
[i]-By Alexandrovitch Katenka Afanasievna
Health & Lifestyle Correspondant[/i]

	Samantha Harriet, Granddaughter of the former Firm Fuel CEO Emmanuel Harriet was found dead on tuesday in her Flaeton apartment. Samantha, a paragon of her community and singer in the band [i]"Top Pop!"[/i], had severe lacerations and puncture wounds across her torso, the images are too graphic to show but leaked crime scene photos do clearly show goose feathers in her apartment. It has been known that Samantha liked the bird, she wore goose themed hats to special occasions, like her famous 'Feast Day Foul' incident, however no one suspected she would've gone so far as to keep one of the birds in her house. Considered an exotic pet, geese have been banned to own in Paxtoria for over a hundred years, although clearly she didn't get the memo, because according to leading police theories she was mauled to death by her own illegal pet! Fans of her have been sparking outrage online, calling for laws banning the hunting of local geese populations to be repealed. So far, no government officals in the city or on the barony level have responded to our request for an interview.
CelebrityDeathA.Title: CelebrityDeathA

Descalation.NewsFull: Peace summits at the ICA headquarters have begun. Although the area around Minthol remains dangerous, our on the ground reporter is adamant that the situation is descelating
Descalation.NewsTitle: Peace Talks Between Ambernesia and Drastara
Descalation.Title: Descalation

EmbassyBombed.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	Since 1996, Ambernesia has maintained an embassy in the Drastaran city of Zhelmov, however early last morning several large truck mounted bombs detonated outside of the 15-story diplomatic center. The explosions, estimated to have killed around 12 people and injured hundreds more, caused severe damage to the building and the surrounding area. The Rozbójnik Osin, a far right Drastran milita group who largely control the city and the north-eastern side of Drastara, have already claimed responsibility for the incident and have promised further military actions against the state of Ambernesia. This event has followed several other aggressive actions by the militia, last saturday an incident involving Ambernesian national guardsmen near Minthol escalated into a deadly shooting. Since then, military buildup in Minthol has escalated, with neither side claiming responsibility for the incident. Now, with the open act of hostility against Ambernesia, the Rozbójnik Osin seem to be preparing for a full blown war with Ambernesia. Although the Drastaran president, Igor Ivanovitch, has not made an official statement regarding the incident, Ambernesian president Milos Bercha has already condemned the attack and declared it an "Act of unprovoked hostility" in a speech given to reporters shortly after the bombing.
EmbassyBombed.NewsTitle: The Ambernesian Embassy in Drastara bombed!
EmbassyBombed.Title: EmbassyBombed

Geese.NewsFull:
[i]-By Astrid Raveana
Buisness Corespondant[/i]

	Early saturday morning, a flock of endangered red tailed geese nearly ten thousand strong descended on the Crescent Moon Port in Xiadia. The port makes up 14% of all imports into Xiadia, and over 80% of imports for the industrial region of Delgana that the port resides in. In response to the crisis, Delgana governer Yugong Shei ordred the port closed until animal control could safely evacuate the endangered birds. animal and wildlife specialist Luon Yuok explained the situation "What we're seing now is a response to aggressive habitat destruction in the Delgana region." She continued. "When these native birds migrate back to the region after winter, they must create new nests, places like docks, that have alot of the same shade they'd look for in marshes and forests, naturally attract the aggressive species." Conservationsts are already starting the long legal battle with Xiadian courts and the ICA to get legal protections for the native homes of these animals. Critics, meanwhile, argue that the region's swift industrialization has lifted millions out of poverty and that these measures might harm the local economy and corporations. In an official statement, a spokesperson for Pelgratan Clean announced that the company would be scaling back operations in the region as a response to the environmental damage.
Geese.NewsTitle: Geese attack the Crescent Moon Port!
Geese.Title: Geese

Pirates.NewsFull: A pirate fleet consisting of 8 ships, multiple over 300m in length attacked a Flaeton Shipping convoy valued at well over $130 Million Pax. Cautiously, Flaeton shipping has begun negotiations for the return of the ships and goods, especially the wheat shipment to Paxtoria.
Pirates.Title: Pirates

Sphere.NewsFull:
[i]-By Alexandrovitch Katenka Afanasievna
Health & Lifestyle Correspondant[/i]

	A strange, oblong sphere that is 3 meters by 2 meters was discovered off the coast of Paxtoria. The vessel, a shining brilliant white was found by local fisherman in the Matthins barony of southern Kaddia, originally the father-son duo who found the object believed it to be a large rare pearl, that could be valued at well over $4 million pax. But when they turned it in to the local authorities, an appraiser discovered that in fact it was made of the incredibly rare and expensive alloy Vandium Steel, however Vandium isn't buoyant, so speculation has circulated that the object might be an Alien spaceship or even a secret government project. Dr Dain, host of the highly controversial and loved show[i] Ancient History, [/i] had the following to say on the mystery in an interview with PNN. "The device- mind you device, no one hides Vandium Steel in the ocean without an expectation it'll do something- tracks with my theories on the ancient continent of Lemuria. The Lemurians, an ancient people with technology far more advanced then ours today likely hid the device in order to subdue our innate telepathic Chi-Waves in order to facilitate a future Lemurian invasion." With theories like this one abounding, its no wonder the sphere has been the subject of much governmental interest. Recently, the Matthins Museum of Culture and Anthropology announced they'd be exhibiting it, but no date has yet been announced.
Sphere.NewsTitle: Mysterious Object off the Coast of Praxtoria
Sphere.Title: Sphere

TroopMovement.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	The city of Minthol, a longterm strategic goal for both Ambernesian and Drastaran heads of state for multiple decades now is seeing renewed concentrations of troops.
TroopMovement.NewsTitle: Mass Moblization in both Drastara and Ambernesia
TroopMovement.Title: TroopMovement

Stocks.stockDescription: In the Jurgan planes west of Xiadia, where Juragi war caravns regularly raid ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association) oil wells and gas depots, a single corporation drives investment into the region. Firm Fuel, formerly Praxtorian Oil, through multiple deep contracts and multi-billion Pax lobbying efforts maintains a monopoly over the vast Juragi oil reserves. Recently they've even made forays into oil reserves in the even more hostile Central Continent, where religious and ethnic disputes between the Sassari locals and the Druidic population often breaks out into large scale conflict.

Natural Energy, a subsidiary of Frontier Tech Global, went public on June 8th 2004. Their IPO, adjusted for inflation was around 12 Billion Pax, with a stable share price of 206. Despite blatant failures to meet performance goals, consistent lack of safety regulation, and multiple breaches in disclosure laws, the company's stock has only skyrocketed, with suspicious investments from Xiadia and the criminal underground of Mercatoria seemingly the driving force. Irregardless of suspicious stock activity, the company does provide a significant amount of the world's solar and wind energy based from their large central manufacturing plant in Xiadia.

In the vast plains of Praxtoria's central region, Kaddia, Vast amber fields of grain and large pasture ranches stretch out further then one can see. If you ask any individual rancher or farmer who they worked for, they might not have an answer. But, ask them who they deliver to, and they will almost all say the Wessen Brothers. Holding a monopoly on the kind of free range, ethical food that many in the Praxtorian middle class are willing to pay a premium for, the Wessen Brothers have enjoyed consistent yearly revenue.

Keddles' founding is of mysterious origin. Not much is known of the original company, Keddles' Pastries and Baked Goods, as they operated in Mercatoria where documentation laws are lacking to say the least. However, from the shadows Keddles has grown to own tens of the largest food companies in the world, from baked goods producers to factory farmed meat products.

Luxury goods manufacturer based out of the continent south of Paxtoria. Bases much of their advertising by referencing back to the ancient glory days that the old Thurgian empire from their home continent experienced. Especially enjoyed by the Paxtorian elite and middle class.

A classical fine goods manufacturer based out of Pelgrata, a mountainous country that borders Xiadia. PGC utilizes a variety of 'old' techniques to manufacture antique furniture and antiques at scale to sell to a hungry Xiadian upper class. Their goods also enjoy some success in other countries, usually adorning the rich and powerful's many mansions and yachts.

Following Xiadia's defeat in the second intercontinental war, The Concordat's demands, that being primarily Praxtoria's demands, were for them to transition into a democracy. Relecutantly acquising, Xiadia privatized many of their state owned organizations, one of which being the merchant marine that had been nearly decimated during the war, and especially during the Concordat's invasion of the largest port in Xiadia, The Crescent Moon Port. A savvy Mercatorian gangster purchased the fleet and branded it as Mercatoria's official shipping company. Due to the lack of any central authority in the country, this has become fact, with the company's vast semi-militarized trade fleet operating across the world, and especially in its closest neighbor, Xiadia.

Flaeton Shipping, founded in 1864 by a pair of brothers who fell in love with aviation from a young age, played a vital role over the latter years of Praxtoria's colonial phase during the Infinitum Imperium. Although Flaeton Shipping at the time was not large, they were the only distributor capable of delivering cross-contential packages and flights. During the age of the Colonial Defense League, after the Praxtorian civil war, Flaeton Shipping connected the vast former colonial holdings of Praxtoria via grand aerial and naval passages. Nowadays, their former prestige has allowed them to prosper as a state sponsored company, continuing their strong aerial traditions with a large fleet of commercial jets.

Diatide was founded in the wild west of the early 80's by co-owners Sean Weiss and Cyllin Ameus. Enjoying explosive growth throughout the latter half of the century due to their revolutionary Operating System, one of the very first in the world at that, and their early adoption of the internet, Diatide has squandered much of their growth due to a stagnat work culture. Suspiciously, the company also appears to have secretly funneled billions of Pax into the Theocratic Nation State of Patrieus in the central continent, who while ostensibly being an ally of the ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association) in their endless war against local Sassari Insurgents still maintains a dense shroud of secrecy around their inner workings.

Founded in 2010, Evion has gone a long way from their IPO (initial public offering) where they were valued at 'only' half a billion Pax. The company has since then taken many shady deals from The ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association), Paxtoria, and Xiadia. Little is known of the exact terms of negotiation, but Evion has enjoyed explosive growth and immunity from many intercontinental laws, and global facial detection software seems to be able to track suspects inside of their homes.

A powerful family in the small nation state of Mercatoria, their power and influence stretches far outside their gang-controlled districts and into the dense web of politics that engulfs many of the most rich and powerful people across the world. When assassinations occur, usually a hired goon from Mercatoria is involved.

Deadeye was founded in Paxtoria in 1743, by two people who wanted their enemies dead. Since then, not much has changed, except now they make helicopters instead of muskets. Although the company's manufacturing capacity is huge, they suffer from internal strife and often struggle to secure contracts from either side of the great political game, Paxtoria or Xiadia.

BorderWar.NewsTitle: Ambernesia and Drastara clash at Minthol
BorderWar.Title: BorderWar

TroopMovement.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	The city of Minthol, a longterm strategic goal for both Ambernesian and Drastaran heads of state for multiple decades now is seeing renewed concentrations of troops.
TroopMovement.NewsTitle: Mass Moblization in both Drastara and Ambernesia
TroopMovement.Title: TroopMovement

Stocks.stockDescription: In the Jurgan planes west of Xiadia, where Juragi war caravns regularly raid ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association) oil wells and gas depots, a single corporation drives investment into the region. Firm Fuel, formerly Praxtorian Oil, through multiple deep contracts and multi-billion Pax lobbying efforts maintains a monopoly over the vast Juragi oil reserves. Recently they've even made forays into oil reserves in the even more hostile Central Continent, where religious and ethnic disputes between the Sassari locals and the Druidic population often breaks out into large scale conflict.

Natural Energy, a subsidiary of Frontier Tech Global, went public on June 8th 2004. Their IPO, adjusted for inflation was around 12 Billion Pax, with a stable share price of 206. Despite blatant failures to meet performance goals, consistent lack of safety regulation, and multiple breaches in disclosure laws, the company's stock has only skyrocketed, with suspicious investments from Xiadia and the criminal underground of Mercatoria seemingly the driving force. Irregardless of suspicious stock activity, the company does provide a significant amount of the world's solar and wind energy based from their large central manufacturing plant in Xiadia.

In the vast plains of Praxtoria's central region, Kaddia, Vast amber fields of grain and large pasture ranches stretch out further then one can see. If you ask any individual rancher or farmer who they worked for, they might not have an answer. But, ask them who they deliver to, and they will almost all say the Wessen Brothers. Holding a monopoly on the kind of free range, ethical food that many in the Praxtorian middle class are willing to pay a premium for, the Wessen Brothers have enjoyed consistent yearly revenue.

Keddles' founding is of mysterious origin. Not much is known of the original company, Keddles' Pastries and Baked Goods, as they operated in Mercatoria where documentation laws are lacking to say the least. However, from the shadows Keddles has grown to own tens of the largest food companies in the world, from baked goods producers to factory farmed meat products.

Luxury goods manufacturer based out of the continent south of Paxtoria. Bases much of their advertising by referencing back to the ancient glory days that the old Thurgian empire from their home continent experienced. Especially enjoyed by the Paxtorian elite and middle class.

A classical fine goods manufacturer based out of Pelgrata, a mountainous country that borders Xiadia. PGC utilizes a variety of 'old' techniques to manufacture antique furniture and antiques at scale to sell to a hungry Xiadian upper class. Their goods also enjoy some success in other countries, usually adorning the rich and powerful's many mansions and yachts.

Following Xiadia's defeat in the second intercontinental war, The Concordat's demands, that being primarily Praxtoria's demands, were for them to transition into a democracy. Relecutantly acquising, Xiadia privatized many of their state owned organizations, one of which being the merchant marine that had been nearly decimated during the war, and especially during the Concordat's invasion of the largest port in Xiadia, The Crescent Moon Port. A savvy Mercatorian gangster purchased the fleet and branded it as Mercatoria's official shipping company. Due to the lack of any central authority in the country, this has become fact, with the company's vast semi-militarized trade fleet operating across the world, and especially in its closest neighbor, Xiadia.

Flaeton Shipping, founded in 1864 by a pair of brothers who fell in love with aviation from a young age, played a vital role over the latter years of Praxtoria's colonial phase during the Infinitum Imperium. Although Flaeton Shipping at the time was not large, they were the only distributor capable of delivering cross-contential packages and flights. During the age of the Colonial Defense League, after the Praxtorian civil war, Flaeton Shipping connected the vast former colonial holdings of Praxtoria via grand aerial and naval passages. Nowadays, their former prestige has allowed them to prosper as a state sponsored company, continuing their strong aerial traditions with a large fleet of commercial jets.

Diatide was founded in the wild west of the early 80's by co-owners Sean Weiss and Cyllin Ameus. Enjoying explosive growth throughout the latter half of the century due to their revolutionary Operating System, one of the very first in the world at that, and their early adoption of the internet, Diatide has squandered much of their growth due to a stagnat work culture. Suspiciously, the company also appears to have secretly funneled billions of Pax into the Theocratic Nation State of Patrieus in the central continent, who while ostensibly being an ally of the ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association) in their endless war against local Sassari Insurgents still maintains a dense shroud of secrecy around their inner workings.

Founded in 2010, Evion has gone a long way from their IPO (initial public offering) where they were valued at 'only' half a billion Pax. The company has since then taken many shady deals from The ICA (Intercontinental Cooperative Association), Paxtoria, and Xiadia. Little is known of the exact terms of negotiation, but Evion has enjoyed explosive growth and immunity from many intercontinental laws, and global facial detection software seems to be able to track suspects inside of their homes.

A powerful family in the small nation state of Mercatoria, their power and influence stretches far outside their gang-controlled districts and into the dense web of politics that engulfs many of the most rich and powerful people across the world. When assassinations occur, usually a hired goon from Mercatoria is involved.

Deadeye was founded in Paxtoria in 1743, by two people who wanted their enemies dead. Since then, not much has changed, except now they make helicopters instead of muskets. Although the company's manufacturing capacity is huge, they suffer from internal strife and often struggle to secure contracts from either side of the great political game, Paxtoria or Xiadia.

BorderWar.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	Members of the radical far right militia operating in the northeast of Drastara, the Rozbójnik Osin, earlier today opened fire on an Ambernesian national guard patrol near the city of Minthol. The city, the former capital of Drastara before the war of Ambernesian Independance, has become a source of renewed tensions in recent months after Ambenesian President Milos Bercha announced the 'liberation' of the city as chief concern in his reelection campaign. This is not the first time shots have been fired over the 450,000 population city. Following the end of the second intercontinental war, Ambernesian forces, who sided with the Concordat to fight against the Southern Alliance which Drastara was a part of, refused to end their occupation of the city. In response, Drastaran terror campaigns for months drained Ambernesia's grip on the region until the state peacefully withdrew. After that, the battle for control over the city had raged in the halls of the ICA. Although the Ambernesian-Drastaran peace treaty drafted now almost a hundred years ago in 1928 did call for 'deoccupation' of the city by the occuping Ambernesian forces, the vaugeness of the exact terms left room for both states ot interpret the issue of ownership at will. Although since then ICA legislation has ruled against past Ambernesian ambition, as Drastara shifts further torwards Xiadia and against the ICA it remains to be seen whether the ICA's priorities will shift on the issue.
BorderWar.NewsTitle: Ambernesia and Drastara clash at Minthol
BorderWar.Title: BorderWar

CelebrityDeathA.NewsFull:
[i]-By Alexandrovitch Katenka Afanasievna
Health & Lifestyle Correspondant[/i]

	Samantha Harriet, Granddaughter of the former Firm Fuel CEO Emmanuel Harriet was found dead on tuesday in her Flaeton apartment. Samantha, a paragon of her community and singer in the band [i]"Top Pop!"[/i], had severe lacerations and puncture wounds across her torso, the images are too graphic to show but leaked crime scene photos do clearly show goose feathers in her apartment. It has been known that Samantha liked the bird, she wore goose themed hats to special occasions, like her famous 'Feast Day Foul' incident, however no one suspected she would've gone so far as to keep one of the birds in her house. Considered an exotic pet, geese have been banned to own in Paxtoria for over a hundred years, although clearly she didn't get the memo, because according to leading police theories she was mauled to death by her own illegal pet! Fans of her have been sparking outrage online, calling for laws banning the hunting of local geese populations to be repealed. So far, no government officals in the city or on the barony level have responded to our request for an interview.
CelebrityDeathA.Title: CelebrityDeathA

Descalation.NewsFull: Peace summits at the ICA headquarters have begun. Although the area around Minthol remains dangerous, our on the ground reporter is adamant that the situation is descelating
Descalation.NewsTitle: Peace Talks Between Ambernesia and Drastara
Descalation.Title: Descalation

EmbassyBombed.NewsFull:
[i]-By Jorge Alejandro
Politics Correspondant[/i]

	Since 1996, Ambernesia has maintained an embassy in the Drastaran city of Zhelmov, however early last morning several large truck mounted bombs detonated outside of the 15-story diplomatic center. The explosions, estimated to have killed around 12 people and injured hundreds more, caused severe damage to the building and the surrounding area. The Rozbójnik Osin, a far right Drastran milita group who largely control the city and the north-eastern side of Drastara, have already claimed responsibility for the incident and have promised further military actions against the state of Ambernesia. This event has followed several other aggressive actions by the militia, last saturday an incident involving Ambernesian national guardsmen near Minthol escalated into a deadly shooting. Since then, military buildup in Minthol has escalated, with neither side claiming responsibility for the incident. Now, with the open act of hostility against Ambernesia, the Rozbójnik Osin seem to be preparing for a full blown war with Ambernesia. Although the Drastaran president, Igor Ivanovitch, has not made an official statement regarding the incident, Ambernesian president Milos Bercha has already condemned the attack and declared it an "Act of unprovoked hostility" in a speech given to reporters shortly after the bombing.
EmbassyBombed.NewsTitle: The Ambernesian Embassy in Drastara bombed!
EmbassyBombed.Title: EmbassyBombed

Geese.NewsFull:
[i]-By Astrid Raveana
Buisness Corespondant[/i]

	Early saturday morning, a flock of endangered red tailed geese nearly ten thousand strong descended on the Crescent Moon Port in Xiadia. The port makes up 14% of all imports into Xiadia, and over 80% of imports for the industrial region of Delgana that the port resides in. In response to the crisis, Delgana governer Yugong Shei ordred the port closed until animal control could safely evacuate the endangered birds. animal and wildlife specialist Luon Yuok explained the situation "What we're seing now is a response to aggressive habitat destruction in the Delgana region." She continued. "When these native birds migrate back to the region after winter, they must create new nests, places like docks, that have alot of the same shade they'd look for in marshes and forests, naturally attract the aggressive species." Conservationsts are already starting the long legal battle with Xiadian courts and the ICA to get legal protections for the native homes of these animals. Critics, meanwhile, argue that the region's swift industrialization has lifted millions out of poverty and that these measures might harm the local economy and corporations. In an official statement, a spokesperson for Pelgratan Clean announced that the company would be scaling back operations in the region as a response to the environmental damage.
Geese.NewsTitle: Geese attack the Crescent Moon Port!
Geese.Title: Geese

Pirates.NewsFull: A pirate fleet consisting of 8 ships, multiple over 300m in length attacked a Flaeton Shipping convoy valued at well over $130 Million Pax. Cautiously, Flaeton shipping has begun negotiations for the return of the ships and goods, especially the wheat shipment to Paxtoria.
Pirates.Title: Pirates

Sphere.NewsFull:
[i]-By Alexandrovitch Katenka Afanasievna
Health & Lifestyle Correspondant[/i]

	A strange, oblong sphere that is 3 meters by 2 meters was discovered off the coast of Paxtoria. The vessel, a shining brilliant white was found by local fisherman in the Matthins barony of southern Kaddia, originally the father-son duo who found the object believed it to be a large rare pearl, that could be valued at well over $4 million pax. But when they turned it in to the local authorities, an appraiser discovered that in fact it was made of the incredibly rare and expensive alloy Vandium Steel, however Vandium isn't buoyant, so speculation has circulated that the object might be an Alien spaceship or even a secret government project. Dr Dain, host of the highly controversial and loved show[i] Ancient History, [/i] had the following to say on the mystery in an interview with PNN. "The device- mind you device, no one hides Vandium Steel in the ocean without an expectation it'll do something- tracks with my theories on the ancient continent of Lemuria. The Lemurians, an ancient people with technology far more advanced then ours today likely hid the device in order to subdue our innate telepathic Chi-Waves in order to facilitate a future Lemurian invasion." With theories like this one abounding, its no wonder the sphere has been the subject of much governmental interest. Recently, the Matthins Museum of Culture and Anthropology announced they'd be exhibiting it, but no date has yet been announced.
Sphere.NewsTitle: Mysterious Object off the Coast of Praxtoria
Sphere.Title: Sphere
